name: opencode-refactor-agent
description: OpenCode plugin with a CLI installer. Note: npm install/bun add only installs the package; run `npx opencode-refactor-agent install` to configure OpenCode.

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log('opencode-refactor-agent installed. Do you want to continue setup?'); console.log('To continue, run: npx opencode-refactor-agent install'); console.log('With Bun, run: bunx opencode-refactor-agent install');"
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && npm run test
